episodes.title: BJJ Cults Exposed: The Gentle Art of Obedience in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu (Episode 1) #martialarts #cult
episodes.description:
This is the brand new Dark Side of the Mat, where I explore the psychology of power, loyalty, silence, and institutional culture in martial arts and combat sports: not just to raise awareness, but to challenge harmful norms and push for meaningful change.. Because we can do better!

Today, we’re diving into Episode 1 - BJJ Cults Exposed: The Gentle Art of Obedience in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu!

By the end of this episode, I want you to think a little differently about not just what happens on the mats, but what gets protected around them...

The real question is never just what happened. The real question is: what kind of culture made it possible?

Like, Subscribe and Share to support my work!

Now, let's dive straight into it!
